aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
Several new device fingerprints (FPs) have been identified in the latest GitHub activity:

1. **From dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee**:
   - **New FPs**:
     - `_TZ3000_cziew6eu`
     - `_TZ3000_iktiy8ue`
     - `_TZE200_d2zfgtij`
     - `_TZE200_s4sa1mcx`
     - `_TZE200_wjk6rurm`
     - `_TZE200_x8diwkqb`
     - `_TZE204_d2zfgtij`
     - `_TZE204_s4sa1mcx`
     - `_TZE204_wjk6rurm`
     - `_TZE204_x8diwkqb`
     - `_TZE284_d2zfgtij`
     - `_TZE284_s4sa1mcx`
     - `_TZE284_wjk6rurm`
     - `_TZE284_x8diwkqb`
   - **Issue Link**: [New Tuya devices found in zigbee2mqtt](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/141)

2. **From JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee**:
   - **New FP**:
     - `_TZ3290_ot6ewjvmej` (related to Moes UFO-R11)
   - **Existing FP**: `_TZ3290_ot6ewjvmejq5ekhl` (used by `ir_blaster`)
   - **Issue Link**: [Device Request - Moes UFO-R11](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1331)

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
The following existing fingerprints have been noted in device requests:

- `_TZE200_vvmbj46n` (for thermostat functionality)
- `_TZ3000_0dumfk2z` (for SOS Emergency Button)
- `_TZE200_8ygsuhe1` (for Smart Airbox)

## Fork Fingerprints to Integrate
Currently, there are no new fingerprints from forks identified for integration.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
Several pull requests (PRs) have been submitted that may contain useful changes:

1. **dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee**:
   - [PR #45](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45): Update driver.compose.json (merged)
   - [PR #46](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46): Adding support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor (not merged)
   - [PR #84](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/84): Fix for soil sensor identification (not merged)

2. **JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee**:
   - [PR #1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253): Added 3 new devices (open)
   - [PR #1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219): Update driver.compose.json (open)
   - [PR #1210](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1210): Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan drivers (open)

This summary captures the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee project, highlighting new device requests, existing support, and ongoing PRs that may enhance functionality. For further details, please refer to the respective GitHub links.
